[requested listing]

IFDNRG are a UK based web and video hosting company with a wide range of expertise in web systems buolt on FreeBSD. We are focused on developing our network to promote high performance and highly scalable web services and have 10 yrs experience in FreeBSD based solutions for web/email and video.

http://www.ifdnrg.com/ifdnrg/unix/

Reasons for addition:
We love FreeBSD and promote it as reliable hosting 
We support the foundation (last 3 yrs)
We subscribe and respond to questions@ 

best regards and many thanks if you can list us..
Paul Macdonald
